visual_description: In a modern office with glass partitions, four men in pilot uniforms sit around a large table, reviewing documents. A fifth man in a white shirt stands with his arms crossed, observing them. A small television screen on the left displays a blue-toned image, possibly a flight simulation.
audio_description: A male voice gives a command in a firm, authoritative tone. The other men respond in unison with a formal, respectful acknowledgment.
